data.content: Renamed misleading test 'max iterations on take-loop triggers enforceQueueTerminalInvariant with rollback' to 'non-zero exit on initial take-loop child triggers enforceQueueTerminalInvariant rollback' since it was testing the non-zero exit path, not max-iterations. Added a new test that drives the take-loop through all 10 iterations (MAX_TAKE_ITERATIONS) with code-0 exits, so the max-iterations branch at terminal-manager.ts:1224-1234 is actually exercised. All 6 tests pass. Branch: feat/705e-max-iterations-test.
